issuetype.description: An improvement or enhancement to an existing feature or task.
issuetype.name: Improvement

fields.description: In our YARN cluster, there are thousands of apps running at the same time, the return result of getApps reaches about 10M, and many requests are the same input parameters, we can add cache for RMWebServices.getApps to reduce processing delay

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed
